question: Will there be a blockbuster movie in the US before the end of 2025 that is acknowledged as written by AI
resolution_criteria:
Given the current writers strike and their concerns about AI content, will a "blockbuster" US movie be acknowledged as written by or significantly assisted an AI be released before the end of 2025?

Defining a "blockbuster" as a movie who's production costs are at least 100M USD.

Defining "written by or significantly assisted an AI" as a news article that describes how they used some sort of AI to write or help write a significant portion of the script.

The movie must open in theaters before December 31st 2025.
